mapper.select: SELECT coupon_id as "id", code as "code", name as "name", description as "description", discount_type as "discountType", discount_value as "discountValue", min_order_value as "minOrderValue", max_discount_amount as "maxDiscountAmount", start_date as "startDate", end_date as "endDate", usage_limit as "usageLimit", usage_count as "usageCount", usage_per_customer as "usagePerCustomer", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId" FROM hm_query.coupon_flat WHERE code = #{code}
SELECT state_id as "stateId", count(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.coupon_flat GROUP BY state_id

SELECT coupon_id as "id", code as "code", name as "name", description as "description", discount_type as "discountType", discount_value as "discountValue", start_date as "startDate", end_date as "endDate", usage_limit as "usageLimit", usage_count as "usageCount", state_id as "stateId" FROM hm_query.coupon_flat WHERE state_id = 'ACTIVE' AND code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%') AND discount_type = #{discountType} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.coupon_flat WHERE state_id = 'ACTIVE' AND code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%') AND discount_type = #{discountType}

SELECT coupon_id as "id", code as "code", name as "name", discount_type as "discountType", discount_value as "discountValue", end_date as "endDate", usage_count as "usageCount", usage_limit as "usageLimit", state_id as "stateId", EXTRACT(DAY FROM (end_date - NOW())) as "daysUntilExpiry" FROM hm_query.coupon_flat WHERE state_id = 'ACTIVE' AND end_date IS NOT NULL AND end_date > NOW() AND end_date <= NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY end_date ASC ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.coupon_flat WHERE state_id = 'ACTIVE' AND end_date IS NOT NULL AND end_date > NOW() AND end_date <= NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days'

SELECT coupon_id as "id", code as "code", name as "name", description as "description", discount_type as "discountType", discount_value as "discountValue", min_order_value as "minOrderValue", max_discount_amount as "maxDiscountAmount", state_id as "stateId" FROM hm_query.coupon_flat WHERE state_id = 'ACTIVE' AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date > NOW()) AND (usage_limit IS NULL OR usage_limit = 0 OR usage_count < usage_limit) AND (min_order_value IS NULL OR min_order_value <= #{cartTotal}) ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.coupon_flat WHERE state_id = 'ACTIVE' AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date > NOW()) AND (usage_limit IS NULL OR usage_limit = 0 OR usage_count < usage_limit) AND (min_order_value IS NULL OR min_order_value <= #{cartTotal})

SELECT coupon_id as "id", code as "code", name as "name", discount_type as "discountType", discount_value as "discountValue", min_order_value as "minOrderValue", max_discount_amount as "maxDiscountAmount", usage_limit as "usageLimit", usage_count as "usageCount", state_id as "stateId", CASE WHEN state_id != 'ACTIVE' THEN 'INACTIVE' WHEN end_date IS NOT NULL AND end_date <= NOW() THEN 'EXPIRED' WHEN usage_limit > 0 AND usage_count >= usage_limit THEN 'USAGE_EXHAUSTED' WHEN min_order_value IS NOT NULL AND min_order_value > #{cartTotal} THEN 'MIN_ORDER_NOT_MET' ELSE 'VALID' END as "validationStatus" FROM hm_query.coupon_flat WHERE code = #{code}
